'''Plett's House''' or '''Plett's Citadel''' was the home [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Plett]] built on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]] around [[88 BBY/Legends|88 BBY]]. He used it as a research [[Laboratory/Legends|lab]]. Many of the greenhouse caverns that surrounded the site were converted to living quarters when a group of refugee Jedi families joined the [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] there. The house was later bombed by forces of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
